title: Fresh ACPX Mission E2E Multi-Packet Smoke
intent: Create one fresh local-only mission that proves ACPX execution across a slightly broader but still bounded packet set. The fresh path should allow up to three tiny TypeScript contract files so the proof is not tied to exactly one packet combination.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh mission can be created for this run.
The plan stays within one wave and at most three work packets.
The mission can be launched and produce fresh round artifacts.
Post-run workflow replay can validate the resulting dashboard surfaces.
constraints: Keep the fresh mission path local-only and bounded.
Plan budget: at most 1 wave and at most 3 work packets.
Only touch src/contracts/mission_types.ts, src/contracts/artifact_types.ts, and src/contracts/review_types.ts inside worker workspaces.
Do not implement dashboard runtime changes, test harnesses, or replay engines during the fresh proof run.
